name: Gery's Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Filling: Combine the cream cheese and sugar, mixing thoroughly. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Beat in salt and vanilla. Pour into prepared graham cracker crust. Bake for 1 hour in a preheated oven set to 325°F.
Topping: Combine the sour cream, sugar, and vanilla. Spread over the top of the cream cheese mixture. Return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes. Remove from the oven and allow to chill. Serve plain or with berries. Makes one deep-dish pie. You can also make a larger version in an 11 x 8 dish. (Prepare the crust by using boxed crushed graham cracker crumbs mixed with butter and pressing into the dish)
